top_signals.title: Tesla Holders Bet on SpaceX Merger as Musk’s Real Endgame
top_signals.summary: It’s been a challenging year for Tesla Inc. shareholders, losing 14% while watching Elon Musk’s SpaceX complete the biggest initial public offering ever and immediately become the most valuable entity in the newly minted trillionaire’s collection.
